title: Nuage Aloe Vera Lotion Cooling XL Pack 600ml | Moisturises, Soothes & Softens Skin | Aloe Vera Enriched Formula for Daily Hydration | Ideal for After-Sun Care & Dry Skin Relief | Non-Greasy
features: XL Pack (600ml) for Long-Lasting Use: This generously sized 600ml pack offers long-lasting skin hydration, ideal for both personal use and families
Aloe Vera Enriched Formula: Infused with Aloe Vera, known for its natural soothing and moisturising properties, leaving your skin soft and smooth.
Cooling Effect for After-Sun Care: Perfect for soothing sun-exposed skin with its cooling properties, making it an excellent choice for after-sun care
Non-Greasy & Quick Absorbing: The lightweight formula absorbs quickly into the skin, providing moisture without leaving any sticky residue.
Suitable for All Skin Types: Gentle and effective for all skin types, making it ideal for daily use to keep your skin hydrated and healthy
description: Product description Nuage Aloe Vera Lotion Cooling XL Pack is specially formulated to moisturise, soothe, and soften your skin. Enriched with Aloe Vera, this lotion helps to replenish moisture, leaving your skin feeling fresh, hydrated, and smooth all day long. Its cooling effect makes it ideal for use after sun exposure or to relieve dry skin. The non-greasy formula absorbs quickly, ensuring no sticky residue is left behind, and the light, fresh scent adds a subtle, pleasant fragrance. This 600ml XL pack is perfect for long-lasting use, providing your skin with the care it needs every day Ingredients aqua, petrolatum, cetearyl alcohol, glycerin, PEG-100 stearate, phenoxyethanol, glyceryl stearate, polyacrylamide, C13-14 isoparaffin, propylene glycol, isopropyl myristate, parfum, methylparaben, ethylparaben, disodium EDTA, laureth-7, aloe barbadensis leaf juice, benzyl salicylate, linalool, alpha-isomethyl ionone, limonene. Safety Warning For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation or rash occurs. See more
